title: Upon Shewbread. Epig.
content:
Last night thou didst invite me home to eat;
    And showed me there much plate, but little meat.
    Prithee, when next thou do'st invite, bar state,
    And give me meat, or give me else thy plate.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Shewbread. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
